name: FIRST FINANCIAL CORP /IN/
summary: First Financial Corporation is an Indiana-based financial holding company headquartered in Terre Haute, Indiana. Through its subsidiary First Financial Bank, N.A., it offers commercial lending, mortgage lending, consumer lending, lease financing, trust account services, and depositor services. The Bank operates branches across Indiana, Illinois, Kentucky, Tennessee, and Georgia, and maintains loan production offices in Indiana and Tennessee.

products.name: Commercial Lending
products.description: Loans for business expansion and asset purchases, including commercial real estate and construction loans.

products.name: Residential Mortgage Lending
products.description: Mortgage loans secured by 1-4 family residences, with most long-term fixed mortgages sold to secondary market.

products.name: Consumer Lending
products.description: Home equity loans, auto loans, and unsecured loans for individual borrowers.

products.name: Lease Financing
products.description: Financing solutions through lease arrangements for customers.

products.name: Trust Account Services
products.description: Trust and fiduciary services offered through the bank subsidiary.

products.name: Depositor Services
products.description: Deposit account products and services for retail and commercial customers.
